name: event_id
description: Deterministic UUID5 of route + service_date. Used as BigQuery insert_id for deduplication. Re-running the pipeline on the same date produces the same event_id.

name: service_date
description: Date of service (YYYY-MM-DD). Table is partitioned on this column for cost-efficient queries.

name: day_type
description: W=Weekday, A=Saturday, U=Sunday or Holiday. Source: CTA Chicago Data Portal.

name: rides
description: Total daily ridership count for this route on this service_date.

name: ingested_at
description: UTC timestamp when the Lambda function ingested this record.

name: source
description: Data source identifier. Always 'chicago_data_portal' for CTA ridership records.

name: temperature_2m
description: Air temperature at 2 metres in degrees Celsius at 8 AM on service_date. Joined from Open-Meteo by the Pub/Sub consumer.

name: apparent_temperature
description: Feels-like temperature in degrees Celsius at 8 AM on service_date. From Open-Meteo.

name: precipitation
description: Total precipitation in mm on service_date. From Open-Meteo.

name: windspeed_10m
description: Wind speed at 10 metres in km/h at 8 AM on service_date. From Open-Meteo.

name: weathercode
description: WMO weather interpretation code. 0=clear sky, 1-3=partly cloudy, 45-48=fog, 61-67=rain, 71-77=snow, 80-82=showers, 95-99=thunderstorm.

name: is_precipitation
description: True if precipitation > 0.1mm on service_date. Derived feature used in Prophet regressors and dbt models.
